infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We use your location to enable geofence check-ins at pickup and delivery.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: We use your location to enable background geofence check-ins while you’re driving.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow camera to capture document photos and signatures.
infoPlist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: We do not track you across apps. Tracking is only used if you explicitly enable analytics.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow background location to enable automatic check-ins when arriving at pickup and delivery.
